items.title: Commits & Branches
items.description: Workflows are policies over commits and branches; the primitives must be understood first.

items.title: Merging & Rebasing
items.description: Workflows specify the integration strategy (merge, squash-merge, rebase-and-merge) at PR time.

items.title: Pull Requests & Reviews
items.description: PRs are the per-change unit of every modern workflow — review, CI, branch protection all attach to PRs.

items.title: Conflict Resolution
items.description: Different workflows produce different conflict frequencies — long-lived branches (GitFlow) amplify conflicts.

items.title: Packaging — pyproject and Releases
items.description: Release tags map to package versions; SemVer/CalVer choices live alongside the workflow choice.
